transcript: In a busy world, many people start their day by grabbing their phones. Instead of feeling the fresh morning air or washing their faces, they check for messages on social media. We use our phone for work and fun, always within reach. Sadly, we didn't notice the beauty of the world around us. But then some people realized the most wonderful moments in life weren't on screens. They started putting down their phones, looking up and seeing the real world. They found joy in simple things like feeling the wind and sharing the love with friends. world will world where the screenware exists, the people discover that the real treasure of life exists in the world around them, not in the digital world.
